hero.description: A fast 3v3 boss-race action game set in modern Tokyo, where iconic Final Fantasy warriors build Bravery, unleash abilities, and defeat the boss before the rival team.

releaseEditions.title: dissidiaduellumfinalfantasy beginner guide
releaseEditions.subtitle: Win your first sessions with a clean crystal-to-boss game plan

editions.name: Step 1: Crystal Priority
editions.releaseDate: Open every match with map control
includes: Clear monsters around crystal spawn sites before forced duels.
Secure purify timing to front-load team Bravery.
Rotate early when enemy pressure shifts to the next crystal.

editions.name: Step 2: Build Bravery
editions.releaseDate: Convert crystal control into Burst readiness
includes: Keep farming neutral objectives while denying free enemy stacks.
Use safe skirmishes only when they protect your crystal tempo.
Track teammate gauges and align your next push.

editions.name: Step 3: Burst Timing
includes: Trigger Bravery Burst with at least one ally in range.
Avoid solo Burst unless it creates guaranteed boss pressure.
Chain unique abilities inside your burst window.

editions.name: Step 4: Boss Burn
editions.releaseDate: Finish before the rival team stabilizes
includes: Dump stored cooldowns during boss vulnerability windows.
Keep one player peeling to stop enemy re-entry.
Reset quickly to crystal control after each damage phase.

highlights: Cloud, Warrior of Light, Terra, and Lightning are clean first mains.
Casual Battles are ideal for testing loadouts before ranked.
The crystal loop is the fastest path to consistent wins.

ratings.title: dissidiaduellumfinalfantasy characters
ratings.subtitle: Launch roster snapshot with role identity and game impact

menTopRated.name: Cloud Strife - Melee carry with boss-damage passive
Warrior of Light - Team shield and stable frontline
Terra Branford - Safe ranged pressure and peel
Lightning - Fast rotations and monster clear tempo
Kain Highwind - Engage pressure via Jump access
Krile Mayer Baldesion - Crystal Bravery amplifier
Zidane Tribal - Bravery theft disruption specialist
Rinoa Heartilly - AoE control and comeback scaling
Gaia - Action-speed bruiser with debuff pressure

womenTopRated.name: Support Role Priority: Warrior of Light / Krile

highlights: Use role-specific rankings when drafting your trio.
Boss race value and crystal tempo both matter in final placement.
Tier shifts follow season rewards and balance patches.

matchTypes.title: dissidiaduellumfinalfantasy team comps
matchTypes.subtitle: Three-player lineups for different win conditions

matches.name: Boss Rush Trio
matches.description: Cloud + Prompto + Warrior of Light for stable burst windows and survivable pushes.

matches.name: Crystal Tempo Trio
matches.description: Krile + Lightning + Zidane for fast rotations, objective denial, and Bravery lead.

matches.name: Beginner Safe Trio
matches.description: Cloud + Terra + Warrior of Light offers direct damage, range safety, and team shielding.

matches.name: Disruptive Ranked Trio
matches.description: Gaia + Zidane + Prompto pressures movement while stealing enemy tempo.

matches.name: Balanced Utility Trio
matches.description: Terra + Krile + Kain mixes zone control, sustain, and engage tools.

newSystems: Draft around objective role coverage, not only damage.
Always assign one crystal anchor before match start.
Keep a planned burst caller in each trio.

faq.title: dissidiaduellumfinalfantasy
faq.subtitle: Fast answers for the core gameplay loop and progression path

questions.question: How do I win faster in dissidiaduellumfinalfantasy?
questions.answer: In dissidiaduellumfinalfantasy, prioritize crystals, build Bravery, coordinate Burst timing, and convert that window into boss damage.

questions.question: Which starter is best in dissidiaduellumfinalfantasy?
questions.answer: For dissidiaduellumfinalfantasy, Cloud is the easiest boss-pressure start, Warrior of Light is the safest team option, and Terra is the clean ranged learner.

questions.question: Does dissidiaduellumfinalfantasy reroll matter?
questions.answer: Yes. dissidiaduellumfinalfantasy reroll quality matters because role-aligned early pulls create a much smoother first-week progression path.

questions.question: What should I train first in dissidiaduellumfinalfantasy?
questions.answer: Start dissidiaduellumfinalfantasy training with crystal rotation timing, burst-call coordination, and one stable three-player lineup.

questions.question: How often should I check the dissidiaduellumfinalfantasy roadmap?
questions.answer: Check the dissidiaduellumfinalfantasy roadmap at least once per week so you can pre-farm for incoming rewards and character updates.

questions.question: Where can I follow official dissidiaduellumfinalfantasy updates?
questions.answer: Follow official dissidiaduellumfinalfantasy updates via the Square Enix site, DDFF EN X account, and the App Store/Google Play pages.
